smoke.detail: Box (RDKit 2026.03.3, linux-64) smoke on the FTO-43 fixture returned SAscore=1.5149 (finite, in [1,10]); direction check ethanol=1.98 < morphinan-like polycycle=5.27 confirms lower=easier. Ran via `pixi run --manifest-path pixi.toml python run.py` in the model's isolated env; output matches core.schemas.OutputRecord.

note: SAscore adapter (RDKit Contrib SA_Score, Ertl & Schuffenhauer 2009), first task to use the vendor/ slot: sascorer.py + fpscores.pkl.gz vendored from box-solved RDKit 2026.03.3 Contrib; lock box-solved; LOWER=easier documented.
